title: Dobberty
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dobberty''' was a [[Clutch (fighter)|Clutch]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and the [[Wingmate/Legends|wingmate]] of [[Remart Sasyru]] within [[Bolt Squadron (Khuiumin Survivors)|Bolt]] of the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] when the unit was under the command of [[Corran Horn/Legends|Jenos Idanian]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

He was present alongside Remart and two others from Three [[Flight group/Legends|Flight]] during the [[Invids|Invid]] raid on [[Kerilt]] that same year; the four [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] had been looting a pair of dead [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassians]] and happened upon a group of [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] refugees. During the resulting situation that involved Idanian confronting Remart's band, Jenos gave a bag of Caamasi jewelry back to its rightful owners; in response, Dobberty protested, claiming that it was "our stuff". In the wake of the fight between Jenos and Remart he, along with the two other members of that flight, were shot with stun blasts by [[Elegos A'Kla]] before they could kill Idanian.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
